nasb.text: Do you not possess what Chemosh your god gives you to possess? So whatever the Lord our God has driven out before us, we will possess it.

esv.text: Will you not possess what Chemosh your god gives you to possess? And all that the Lord our God has dispossessed before us, we will possess.

cnv.text: 你不是應佔有你的神基抹要你佔有的地嗎？我們不是應佔有耶和華我們的　神，從我們面前趕走的人的一切地嗎？

ccb.text: 你拥有你们的神明基抹给你们的土地，我们也要拥有我们的上帝耶和华赐给我们的土地。
